signals.reasoning: The live SOL short is still at peak unrealized PnL with no giveback yet, so this is a real manage-it hold rather than a cleanup exit. Confidence stays capped because the board is only CAUTION and the position still has no stop.
BTC is recovering, but under a live macro caution it remains context rather than a better trade than the position already on the book.
ETH is also recovering, but it is not cleaner than the existing SOL short and does not justify shifting focus away from position management.
TST remains far too extended to trust as a fresh trade, even though the squeeze was real. No reason to add complexity while managing a live position.
STABLE still has squeeze characteristics, but under CAUTION and with current structure already mixed, it is not compelling enough to distract from the open SOL short.
MERL looks like a rebound rather than a high-quality fresh setup. It is not better than simply managing the existing position cleanly.
WLD remains structurally constructive but not in a way that competes with the open trade for attention right now. Better to stay neutral.
CHILLGUY still reads more like a recovery name than a clean new entry, and under caution there is no need to force it.
LIT is no longer giving a clean active short edge and does not offer a better trade than the SOL position already open.
WCT is still too extended and too messy on execution quality to justify acting while a live position is already on the books.
ZEREBRO remains a noisy rebound name rather than a durable clean setup. Watch-only is the disciplined answer.
